_comment: V3-15 Gold Standard Engine — HARDCODED SYSTEM CONFIG. This file is the single source of truth for all threshold rules. It survives container restarts, Railway redeploys, and context flushes. The code reads this file at startup and REFUSES to publish any pick that does not meet these standards.
_version: V3 Titan XII — Safety Valve Edition

thresholds._rule: NO pick may be published below MIN_THRESHOLD (0.65). This is absolute. No exceptions.

fallback.soccer: The Odds API (api.the-odds-api.com) — soccer_epl, soccer_spain_la_liga, etc.

last_resort.soccer: ESPN free fixtures API (no credits required)
last_resort.nba: ESPN free fixtures API (no credits required)

api_budget._rule: Automated tasks stop at 90 calls/day. 10 calls always reserved for manual admin dashboard actions.

fail_safe_rules.suspended_key: On ApiSuspendedError: log CRITICAL alert, immediately switch to fallback source, do NOT retry suspended key
fail_safe_rules.quota_exhausted: On HTTP 401/429 or OUT_OF_USAGE_CREDITS: log CRITICAL alert, block all further auto-calls, switch to ESPN last-resort
fail_safe_rules.timeout: 15-second AbortController timeout per API call. Exponential backoff: 2s, 4s, 8s on transient failures
fail_safe_rules.zero_picks: On 0 picks generated: log CRITICAL, mark run as EMPTY, do NOT publish empty page
fail_safe_rules.no_dark_policy: NEVER show 0 picks on the live site. If primary threshold (68%) fails, use 65% floor with High Volatility label
fail_safe_rules.kill_switch: After 3 consecutive GlobalMonitor failures: halt all auto-tasks, send critical alert to admin dashboard
fail_safe_rules.startup_catchup: On Railway restart after 1 AM: check for missing picks, trigger generation once with full failover chain

data_source_health._ui_rule: Admin dashboard must show a colored health dot for each API source: GREEN=active, YELLOW=degraded, RED=suspended/quota

v3_15_factors.F05: Rest Days & Fixture Congestion — MEDIUM weight
v3_15_factors.F08: Tactical Setup & Style Match — MEDIUM weight
v3_15_factors.F11: Travel Distance & Time Zone — LOW weight
v3_15_factors.F12: Line Movement & Opening Odds — HIGH weight
v3_15_factors.F13: Sharp Money / Market Steam — HIGH weight
v3_15_factors.F14: Public Betting % vs Sharp % — MEDIUM weight
v3_15_factors.F15: V3 Model Historical Accuracy — HIGH weight
